case_title: ADAM WARHEIT VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WARHEIT, ADAM AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ROGERS, PEARL ANGELINA DOES 1 TO 100 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-01-2011 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-01-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-16-2011
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF WARHEIT, ADAM
FEES NOT PAID. COMPLAINT OF ADAM WARHEIT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ADAM WARHEIT IS STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES. (206)
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WARHEIT, ADAM

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAR-09-2011 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT ADAM WARHEIT'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIES THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-01-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR, COMPLAINT STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF WARHEIT, ADAM HEARING SET FOR MAR-09-2011 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF WARHEIT, ADAM SERVED FEB-15-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
